cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Works fine, but freezes once opening the settings, trying to access any consoles or look around on the bridge. So far, I have been unable to find a solution for these issues. While the game is playable, it becomes quite frustrating and difficult, for example if you want to change warp speed or fly to a location which is not the current mission objective.
title: Star Trek™: Starfleet Academy

notes: The game runs, but with the problems mentioned in the previous bronze report. The game is not really playable on my system.
title: Star Trek™: Starfleet Academy
